summary: Build a simple website that lets a user attach/upload a photo of an apology letter to send/share with their boyfriend.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimal line-art illustration of an envelope with a small heart, warm neutral palette (apology-illustration.dim_1200x400.png)
- Simple monochrome site mark combining a small envelope icon and initials 'AL' (apology-logo.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a single-page website that lets a user attach/upload a photo of an apology letter and then generate a shareable link that can be sent to their boyfriend to view the uploaded photo.
Create a dedicated 'View shared letter' route/page that reads the ID from the URL, fetches the image from the backend, and renders it responsively with basic loading and error states.

Apply a coherent, creative visual theme appropriate for a personal apology-letter sharing page (avoid blue/purple as primary colors), and use it consistently across upload and view pages (typography, spacing, buttons, and layout).
Add generated static images as part of the UI theme (logo/illustration) and render them from frontend/public/assets/generated without routing images through the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Website for uploading/attaching a photo of an apology letter to share/send to boyfriend

Implement backend storage and retrieval for uploaded apology-letter images using the single Motoko actor, including creation of a unique public ID per upload and a read endpoint to fetch the image by ID.

projectName: Apology Letter Photo Upload and Share Page
